scripts.build: npm -w @streampulse/shared run build && npm -w @streampulse/events run build && npm -w @streampulse/api run build && npm -w web run build
scripts.build:web: npm -w @streampulse/shared run build && npm -w @streampulse/events run build && npm -w web run build
scripts.build:api: npm -w @streampulse/shared run build && npm -w @streampulse/events run build && npm -w @streampulse/api run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @streampulse/shared run typecheck && npm -w @streampulse/events run typecheck && npm -w @streampulse/api run typecheck && npm -w web run typecheck
scripts.lint: echo "(no lint configured — typecheck covers correctness)"
